results.title: Conagra Brands AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
Conagra Brands has positioned itself as a leader in AI-driven transformation within the consumer packaged goods industry through its multi-year initiative called 'Project Catalyst' [1][2]. Launched in December 2025, this comprehensive program leverages artificial intelligence, data, and automation to reengineer core business processes and drive margin expansion [3]. CEO Sean Connolly emphasized that the company is 'reimagining ways of working, transforming end-to-end processes, and connecting our people with cutting-edge technology in ways that will drive efficiency and effectiveness' [4]. The initiative targets manual processes in consumer packaged goods operations, building on Conagra's existing AI partnerships with Microsoft and EY that began in 2024 [5]. While specific financial targets haven't been disclosed, management expects to provide more detailed updates throughout fiscal 2026 as the program progresses [6].
...

...
AI hiring signals show a paradoxical pattern where non-technical roles (6.8%) have higher AI mention rates than technical roles (0%). This suggests AI adoption is happening in operational and business functions rather than being driven by traditional tech teams, indicating a business-first rather than technology-first approach to AI implementation.

Project Catalyst is a multi-year initiative using AI, data, and automation to reengineer core business processes. It targets manual processes in consumer packaged goods operations to drive efficiency, effectiveness, and margin expansion across the company.

Conagra emphasizes a human-centered approach that prioritizes responsible AI use and puts employees at the center of its strategy. The focus is on empowering employees rather than replacing them, with AI tools designed to enhance decision-making and productivity.

results.title: Chad Krause
highlights:
Leading best-in-class talent across Conagra’s data science, analytics, insights, strategy, & business intelligence. Drive data-informed decision-making across Brand, Commercial, Sales, Marketing, Demand Science, and Innovation, while leading the strategy, development, and deployment of AI/ML capabilities that power enterprise transformation. Expanded scope to unify insights, analytics, data science, and data platforms into a cohesive, enterprise-wide capability by elevating data maturity, accelerating decision velocity, and enabling scalable growth. Key Leadership Impact Enterprise Analytics Strategy: Defined and executed a unified analytics vision spanning forecasting, pricing, marketing effectiveness, and innovation ROI by embedding analytics into core business strategy and delivering measurable enterprise value. AI/ML & Advanced Analytics: Scaled predictive modeling, machine learning, and demand sensing capabilities to anticipate market shifts, optimize marketing and commercial decisions, and transform decision-making culture. Data & Platform Transformation: Led modernization of the data and analytics ecosystem (Snowflake, Databricks, Power BI, Tableau, Alteryx, Sigma), enabling self-service analytics, trusted data foundations, and advanced modeling at scale. Executive Partnership & Influence: Embedded analytics into business planning processes, linking insights to financial outcomes and serving as a trusted advisor to senior leadership. Enterprise Data Leadership: Guided data engineering, architecture, and visualization strategy to ensure high-quality, accessible, and actionable insights across the organization. Organization & Talent Development: Built and led high-performing, cross-functional teams across data science, analytics, and engineering by fostering a culture of innovation, technical excellence, and impact. 🏆 FY22 CFO Award – Creativity in Pricing Analytics & Reporting
...
's a
...
team is utilizing AI to the consumer's benefit - from the
...
Conagra feeds different data sets, like weather forecasts, into its AI models, allowing it to better assess how weather can impact weekly demand for its Swiss Miss hot chocolate.
...
, if some regions of
...
are going through a warm spell and others are seeing a blizzard on the horizon,
...
can now determine how much Swiss Miss product we need to send to specific regions around the country based on projected weather patterns,” Brian Archey, Conagra's VP of data science and analytics, said in email comments. “This is helping us to address demand opportunities in a timely manner so that we have enough product on the shelf when consumers are seeking it out.” #ai #datascience #analytics

# Sr. Data Scientist - Agentic AI (Minneapolis preferred, remote eligible)

To make the food people love, we need to make sure we feed our decision makers the right data and solutions at the right time, every time. # Lead D&T Data Scientist - Marketing Measurement - Remote Eligible
...
Do you love using data and causal methods to shape real marketing decisions and budgets? As a Lead Data Scientist – Marketing Measurement at General Mills, you’ll use advanced statistics, econometrics, and machine learning to measure what truly drives growth and to optimize how we invest our marketing dollars across channels.
...
You will partner closely with marketing, and media teams to build and evolve our Marketing Mix Models (MMM) and related measurement frameworks—translating complex insights into clear recommendations that influence brand and portfolio strategy. To make the food people love, we need to make sure we feed our decision makers the right data and solutions at the right time, every time. You will play a critical role in that mission.
...
- Develop, validate, and maintain robust Marketing Mix Models (MMM) and related marketing effectiveness models to quantify the impact of media and non-media drivers on business outcomes.
...
- Design and implement causal measurement strategies, including approaches such as Difference-in-Differences, Regression Discontinuity, and causal ML, to estimate incremental impact.
...
- Conduct in-depth statistical and econometric analysis to measure marketing effectiveness, forecast future performance, and inform investment and scenario planning.
...
- Collaborate with machine learning engineering and data engineering to ensure models are production-ready, monitored, and continuously improved.
...
- Graduate degree (Master’s or PhD) in Mathematics, Statistics, Data Science, Operations Research, Econometrics, Applied Economics, Computer Science, or a related quantitative field with 5+ years of professional experience as a hands-on coding Data Scientist, or
...
- Bachelor’s degree in a related quantitative field with 7+ years of professional experience as a hands-on coding Data Scientist.
...
- Substantial, real-world experience with Marketing Mix Modeling:
...
- Hands-on responsibility for building, refining, or maintaining MMM (or very closely related marketing effectiveness models) that have been used to guide budget allocation or channel strategy.
...
- Expert-level programming in Python and SQL, including demonstrated experience working with large, complex datasets and writing advanced SQL queries.
...
- Deep understanding of causal modeling principles (e.g., DAG design, assumptions and falsification, Difference-in-Differences, Regression Discontinuity) and regression modeling (e.g., panel data, time series, regularized regression such as ridge).
...
- Experience with Bayesian modeling (e.g., PyMC) and MMM / marketing effectiveness frameworks (e.g., PyMC-based MMM, Meridian, Robyn, or similar).
...
- Familiarity with modern machine learning methods, such as Gradient Boosting / XGBoost, and how to integrate these into broader modeling solutions.
...
- Experience working in cloud-based data and AI environments.
...
- Experience in marketing analytics agencies, consulting firms, or in-house media/marketing effectiveness teams.
...
- Experience with MLOps practices for analytical models (versioning, monitoring, performance tracking) is a plus.
...

results.title: IT Financial & Analytics Analyst | Hirevector
highlights:
# IT Financial & Analytics Analyst
...
Reporting to the Director of IT, you will join Conagra Brands as an IT Financial & Analytics Analyst within our GBIS team. You will leverage your expertise in data analytics to deliver actionable insights that drive financial forecasting, reporting, and cost optimization. You will design and maintain key metric reporting through Power BI dashboards, develop analytic models to predict IT costs, and collaborate with cross-functional teams to improve processes and enhance operational efficiency. This hybrid role offers high visibility with GBIS leadership and an opportunity to make a measurable impact on enterprise data initiatives. Your Impact Interpret complex data sets to support financial forecasting and reporting, presenting insights in a clear and actionable manner. Design, implement, and maintain metrics and dashboards using Power BI and other Microsoft Power Platform tools. Conduct cost-benefit analysis and ROI assessments to ensure solutions deliver maximum value. Develop analytic models for predicting and analyzing cloud compute and storage costs. Monitor and resolve data-related issues, ensuring data quality and compliance. Lead training and change management initiatives on data or agile topics. Identify opportunities for process automation and technology enhancements to streamline manual tasks. Recommend and implement solutions that improve business processes and operational efficiency. Build strong relationships with Finance, GBS, IT teams, and cross-functional partners. Execute and support enterprise data governance programs, including documentation of policies, standards, data dictionaries, and data lineage. Communicate effectively with IT, business partners, and leadership. Operate in an Agile team environment, working across geographies and cultures.
...
- Bachelor’s degree in business, technology, or related field.
- 3+ years of experience in data analytics, financial forecasting, or related business analysis roles.
- Strong problem-solving, reasoning, and analytical skills.
- Excellent communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills.
- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and able to operate independently.
- Demonstrated initiative, tenacity, and ability to drive change in a dynamic environment.
- Proficiency in data analysis tools and hands-on experience with Microsoft Power Platform (Power BI / Fabric, Power Automate, Power Apps).

- Nice-to-haves
- Experience working with internal Conagra data and projects.
- Experience within Agile Methodology frameworks (Jira experience a plus).
- Experience with ERP applications (SAP R3, S4, BI, Business Objects) and Microsoft Office Suite.
- Exposure to cloud analytics tools and AI (e.g., Copilot, Databricks).
- Travel up to 10% as needed.

results.title: [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II | Wfh
highlights:
# [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II
...
Note: The job is a remote job and is open to candidates in USA. Cotiviti is a healthcare technology company focused on delivering better care at lower costs through advanced technology and data analytics. The Senior Generative AI Scientist II will work with a team to solve healthcare issues using machine learning and AI techniques, delivering value through innovative data solutions. Responsibilities • Work with key stakeholders within Research and Development as well as Business Operations, along with Product Management to assess the potential value and risks associated with business problems that have the potential to be solved using machine learning and Artificial Intelligence techniques • Develop an exploratory data analysis approach to verify the initial hypothesis associated with potential Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning use cases • Document your approach, thinking and results in standard approaches to allow other data scientists to collaborate with you on this work • Prepare your final trained model and develop a validation test set for QA • Work with ML Ops/Production operations to deploy your model into production and support them in monitoring model performance • Participate in design sessions to continuously develop and improve the Cotiviti machine learning platform • Participate in other data science initiatives, collaborating with your peers to support their projects • Participate in knowledge sharing sessions to bring new insights and technologies to the team • Provide End to End value-based solutions, including data pipeline, model creation and application for end user consumption • Complete all responsibilities as outlined in the annual performance review and/or goal setting • Complete all special projects and other duties as assigned • Must be able to perform duties with or without reasonable accommodation Skills • Graduate degree in a quantitative discipline such as Computer Science/Engineering, Statistics, Operations Research covering Advanced Statistics, Machine learning and AI • Experience with the latest techniques in natural language processing including transformers, fine-tuning LLMs, measuring/benchmarking and deploying LLMs with tools such as HuggingFace, Langchain, LLAMA/Mistral and OpenAI, vector databases • 5+ years of hands-on data science/AI experience, using typical machine learning and data science tools including pandas, scikit-learn, keras, nltk, and TensorFlow/PyTorch, GPU • Experience building production-grade machine learning deployments on AWS, Azure, or GCP • Experience working with Apache Spark™ and large-scale distributed datasets • Experience communicating technical concepts to non-technical and technical audiences is a plus • Flexibility to work with global teams as well geographically dispersed US based teams • Professional with ability to properly handle confidential information • Ability to work within a matrixed organization • Proficiency in all required skills and competencies above Benefits • Medical • Dental • Vision • Disability • Life insurance coverage • 401(k) savings plans • Paid family leave • 9 paid holidays per year • 17-27 days of Paid Time Off (PTO) per year, depending on specific level and length of service with Cotiviti. Company Overview • Cotiviti enables healthcare organizations to deliver better care at lower cost through advanced technology and data analytics that improve the quality and sustainability of healthcare in the United States. It was founded in 1979, and is headquartered in South Jordan, UT, US, with a workforce of 5001-10000 employees. Its website is Company H1B Sponsorship • Cotiviti has a track record of offering H1B sponsorships, with 165 in 2025, 118 in 2024, 90 in 2023, 102 in 2022, 72 in 2021, 67 in 2020. Please note that this does not guarantee sponsorship for this specific role.

results.title: Generative Artificial Intelligence Architect (Remote) | WorkPilot
highlights:
Generative Artificial Intelligence Architect (Remote) | WorkPilot
...
# Generative Artificial Intelligence Architect (Remote)
...
- AI System Architecture: Design and develop the architecture and infrastructure for AI systems, including data storage, processing, and retrieval mechanisms. Ensure scalability, flexibility, and efficiency of the system to handle large volumes of data and complex algorithms.
...
- Algorithm Development: Develop and implement advanced AI algorithms and models, including machine learning, deep learning, and neural networks. Continuously evaluate and improve algorithms to enhance system performance and accuracy.
...
- Data Integration: Identify relevant data sources and design methods for data collection, integration, cleansing, and transformation. Collaborate with data scientists and engineers to ensure quality and relevance of data for AI model training.
...
- Model Training and Evaluation: Train AI models using supervised, unsupervised, or reinforcement learning techniques. Implement evaluation methodologies to measure the performance and effectiveness of trained models. Fine-tune models based on feedback and data insights.
...
- Neural Network Design: Design and optimize deep learning neural networks for various AI tasks, such as natural language processing, computer vision, recommendation systems, and predictive analytics. Implement innovative architectures and techniques to improve model accuracy and efficiency.
...
- System Integration: Collaborate with software developers and engineers to integrate AI systems into existing platforms or applications. Ensure seamless communication and compatibility between AI components and other software modules.
...
fairness, transparency
...
- Research and Innovation: Stay updated with the latest advancements in AI technologies, frameworks, and algorithms. Conduct research and experimentation to explore new approaches and techniques that can enhance AI capabilities.
...
- Collaboration and Communication: Collaborate with multi-functional teams, including data scientists, software engineers, and business partners, to define AI requirements and deliver AI solutions that meet business objectives. Communicate complex AI concepts and solutions effectively to both technical and non-technical team members.
...
- Qualifications:
...
- A Bachelor's or equivalent experience or Master's degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, or related field.
...
- Proven experience in designing and developing AI systems, including machine learning, deep learning, and neural networks.
...
- Strong programming skills in languages such as Python, R, or Java. Familiarity with AI libraries, frameworks, and tools such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, or Keras.
...
- Solid understanding of cloud computing platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure, Google Cloud) and experience deploying AI models on these platforms.
...
- Comprehension of AI concepts, algorithms, and methodologies.
...
- Knowledge of designing large scale AI solutions, data integration, cleansing, and transformation techniques.
...
- Familiarity with BigData platforms and technologies, such as Hadoop or Spark.
...
- Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills, with the ability to think creatively and provide innovative solutions.
...
- Strong communication and collaboration skills to work effectively in multidisciplinary teams.
...
- Knowledge of ethical AI practices and regulations is a plus.
...
Job Posting : Feb 06 2024
